{{16TeamBracket-Compact-Tennis5
|RD1=Qualifying first round
|RD2=Qualifying second round
|RD3=Qualifying round
|RD1-team01='''{{flagicon|GBR}} [[Arthur Fery]]'''
|RD1-score01-1='''6'''
|RD1-score01-2='''6'''
|RD1-team02={{flagicon|FRA}} [[Pierre-Hugues Herbert]]
|RD1-score02-1=3
|RD1-score02-2=4
}}
